```python
                 'SIEM', True, ['server-01'], 'phishing'),
        Incident('INC-003', 'P3', now - timedelta(days=3),
                 now - timedelta(days=3, hours=-18), now - timedelta(days=2),
                 'manual', False, ['ws-002'], 'vulnerability'),
    ]
    alerts = [
        *[Alert(f'A{i}', 'HIGH', now - timedelta(days=i), i % 5 == 0, 'SIEM', 15.0) for i in range(100)],
        *[Alert(f'B{i}', 'MEDIUM', now - timedelta(days=i), i % 3 == 0, 'EDR', 10.0) for i in range(50)],
    ]
    vulns = [
        AssetVuln('db-01', 'CVE-2024-1234', 'critical', now - timedelta(days=5),
                  now - timedelta(days=4), 1),
        AssetVuln('web-01', 'CVE-2024-5678', 'high', now - timedelta(days=15),
                  None, 7),
        AssetVuln('ws-01', 'CVE-2024-9012', 'medium', now - timedelta(days=20),
                  now - timedelta(days=10), 30),
    ]
    generator = SecurityMetricsDashboardGenerator()
    dashboard = generator.generate(period_start, now, incidents, alerts, vulns)
    print(f'Security KPI Dashboard: {dashboard.period_start[:10]} to {dashboard.period_end[:10]}')
    print(f'\nExecutive Summary: {dashboard.executive_summary}')
    print(f'\nKPIs:')
    for m in dashboard.metrics:
        icon = {'green': '[OK]', 'yellow': '[WARN]', 'red': '[CRIT]'}[m.status.value]
        print(f'  {icon} {m.name}: {m.value}{m.unit} (target: {m.target}{m.unit}) [{m.trend}]')
    print(f'\nIncident Breakdown: {dashboard.incident_breakdown}')
    print(f'\nRecommendations:')
    for rec in dashboard.recommendations:
        print(f'  - {rec}')
    if dashboard.top_risks:
        print(f'\nTop Risks (RED status): {dashboard.top_risks}')
```

instruction: Implement a mobile application static security analyzer that inspects APK/IPA metadata, detects insecure permissions, hardcoded secrets, dangerous API usage, and maps findings to OWASP Mobile Top 10 and MITRE ATT&CK Mobile.
output:
```python
import re
import json
import hashlib
import zipfile
import base64
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List, Dict, Optional, Set
from pathlib import Path
from enum import Enum

class Platform(Enum):
    ANDROID = 'android'
    IOS = 'ios'

class FindingSeverity(Enum):
    CRITICAL = 'critical'
    HIGH = 'high'
    MEDIUM = 'medium'
    LOW = 'low'
    INFO = 'info'

@dataclass
class SecurityFinding:
    finding_id: str
    severity: FindingSeverity
    category: str
    title: str
    description: str
    file_path: str
    line_number: Optional[int]
    evidence: str
    owasp_mobile: str     # e.g. M1, M2, ...
    mitre_technique: str  # ATT&CK Mobile
    remediation: str
    cwe_id: str

@dataclass
class MobileAppAnalysisReport:
    app_name: str
    package_name: str
    version: str
    platform: Platform
    file_hash_sha256: str
    total_findings: int
    findings_by_severity: Dict[str, int]
    findings: List[SecurityFinding]
    owasp_coverage: Dict[str, int]
    risk_score: float    # 0-10
    risk_label: str
    summary: str


# -------- Android permission risk database --------
DANGEROUS_PERMISSIONS = {
    'READ_CONTACTS': ('HIGH', 'M1', 'T1636.003', 'CWE-359', 'Contacts data exposure'),
    'READ_CALL_LOG': ('HIGH', 'M1', 'T1636.002', 'CWE-359', 'Call log access'),
    'READ_SMS': ('CRITICAL', 'M1', 'T1636.004', 'CWE-359', 'SMS/OTP interception risk'),
    'RECEIVE_SMS': ('CRITICAL', 'M1', 'T1636.004', 'CWE-359', 'SMS/OTP interception risk'),
    'SEND_SMS': ('HIGH', 'M1', 'T1636.004', 'CWE-359', 'Premium SMS fraud risk'),
    'RECORD_AUDIO': ('HIGH', 'M1', 'T1429', 'CWE-359', 'Microphone surveillance'),
    'CAMERA': ('HIGH', 'M1', 'T1512', 'CWE-359', 'Camera capture surveillance'),
    'ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION': ('MEDIUM', 'M1', 'T1430', 'CWE-359', 'Precise location tracking'),
    'ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION': ('HIGH', 'M1', 'T1430', 'CWE-359', 'Background location tracking'),
    'READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE': ('MEDIUM', 'M2', 'T1533', 'CWE-922', 'External storage data access'),
    'WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE': ('MEDIUM', 'M2', 'T1533', 'CWE-922', 'External storage write'),
    'PROCESS_OUTGOING_CALLS': ('HIGH', 'M1', 'T1636.002', 'CWE-359', 'Call interception'),
    'READ_PHONE_STATE': ('MEDIUM', 'M1', 'T1422', 'CWE-359', 'Device identifier disclosure'),
    'GET_ACCOUNTS': ('MEDIUM', 'M1', 'T1636', 'CWE-359', 'Account enumeration'),
    'USE_BIOMETRIC': ('LOW', 'M4', 'T1517', 'CWE-287', 'Biometric bypass risk if not hardened'),
    'INSTALL_PACKAGES': ('CRITICAL', 'M8', 'T1629', 'CWE-494', 'Arbitrary app installation'),
    'REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES': ('CRITICAL', 'M8', 'T1629', 'CWE-494', 'Arbitrary app installation'),
    'BIND_DEVICE_ADMIN': ('CRITICAL', 'M8', 'T1629.003', 'CWE-284', 'Device admin abuse'),
    'DISABLE_KEYGUARD': ('HIGH', 'M9', 'T1516', 'CWE-284', 'Lock screen bypass'),
    'SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW': ('HIGH', 'M7', 'T1516', 'CWE-1021', 'Overlay attack / UI deception'),
    'INTERNET': ('INFO', 'M3', 'T1437', 'CWE-311', 'Network communication (review endpoints)'),
    'CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE': ('LOW', 'M9', 'T1629', 'CWE-284', 'Network configuration change'),
    'BLUETOOTH_ADMIN': ('MEDIUM', 'M1', 'T1430', 'CWE-359', 'Bluetooth surveillance risk'),
    'NFC': ('LOW', 'M2', 'T1430', 'CWE-200', 'NFC data read'),
}

# -------- Code analysis patterns --------
CODE_PATTERNS = [
    # M2 - Insecure Data Storage
    {
        'id': 'CP001', 'title': 'Hardcoded API Key / Secret',
        'pattern': re.compile(
            r'(?:api[_-]?key|apikey|secret[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|auth[_-]?token|client[_-]?secret)'
            r'\s*[=:]\s*["\']([A-Za-z0-9_\-./+]{16,})["\']', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.CRITICAL, 'owasp': 'M9', 'mitre': 'T1552.001',
        'cwe': 'CWE-798',
        'remediation': 'Remove hardcoded secrets; use Android Keystore / iOS Keychain with runtime injection',
    },
    # M3 - Insecure Communication
    {
        'id': 'CP002', 'title': 'Cleartext HTTP URL',
        'pattern': re.compile(r'["\']http://[a-zA-Z0-9][^"\']+ ["\']|["\']http://(?!localhost|127\.0\.0\.1)[^"\']+ ["\']', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.HIGH, 'owasp': 'M3', 'mitre': 'T1040',
        'cwe': 'CWE-319',
        'remediation': 'Enforce HTTPS; configure Android Network Security Config to block cleartext',
    },
    # Disabled SSL validation - M3
    {
        'id': 'CP003', 'title': 'SSL Certificate Validation Disabled',
        'pattern': re.compile(
            r'(setHostnameVerifier\(ALLOW_ALL\)|ALLOW_ALL_HOSTNAME_VERIFIER|'
            r'checkServerTrusted[^}]+\{[\s]*\}|trustAllCerts|'
            r'setDefaultHostnameVerifier|kCFStreamSSLValidatesCertificateChain.*false)', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.CRITICAL, 'owasp': 'M3', 'mitre': 'T1557',
        'cwe': 'CWE-295',
        'remediation': 'Remove TrustAllCerts pattern; implement certificate pinning',
    },
    # M2 - Insecure data storage: SharedPreferences with sensitive data
    {
        'id': 'CP004', 'title': 'Sensitive Data in SharedPreferences (Unencrypted)',
        'pattern': re.compile(
            r'\.putString\(["\'](?:password|token|secret|credit|ssn|pin|key)["\']', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.HIGH, 'owasp': 'M2', 'mitre': 'T1533',
        'cwe': 'CWE-312',
        'remediation': 'Use EncryptedSharedPreferences from Android Security library',
    },
    # M1 - Logging sensitive data
    {
        'id': 'CP005', 'title': 'Sensitive Data Logged',
        'pattern': re.compile(
            r'(?:Log\.d|Log\.e|Log\.i|Log\.v|Log\.w|System\.out\.print|NSLog|print)'
            r'[^;\n]*(?:password|token|secret|credit.?card|ssn|api.?key)', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.HIGH, 'owasp': 'M2', 'mitre': 'T1533',
        'cwe': 'CWE-532',
        'remediation': 'Remove sensitive data from logs; use ProGuard to strip debug logs in release builds',
    },
    # M4 - Insecure authentication: weak random
    {
        'id': 'CP006', 'title': 'Cryptographically Weak Random Number Generator',
        'pattern': re.compile(r'\bnew Random\(\)|Math\.random\(\)|java\.util\.Random', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.MEDIUM, 'owasp': 'M5', 'mitre': 'T1600',
        'cwe': 'CWE-338',
        'remediation': 'Use SecureRandom for security-sensitive operations',
    },
    # M5 - Insecure crypto: ECB mode
    {
        'id': 'CP007', 'title': 'Insecure AES ECB Mode',
        'pattern': re.compile(r'Cipher\.getInstance\(["\']AES(?:/ECB)?["\']\)', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.HIGH, 'owasp': 'M5', 'mitre': 'T1600',
        'cwe': 'CWE-327',
        'remediation': 'Use AES/GCM/NoPadding for authenticated encryption',
    },
    # Dynamic code loading - M8
    {
        'id': 'CP008', 'title': 'Dynamic Code Loading',
        'pattern': re.compile(
            r'DexClassLoader|PathClassLoader|loadClass|Class\.forName|'
            r'dlopen|NSBundle\.bundleWithPath|dlsym', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.HIGH, 'owasp': 'M8', 'mitre': 'T1629',
        'cwe': 'CWE-494',
        'remediation': 'Avoid dynamic class loading; if required, verify integrity of loaded code',
    },
    # Intent injection - M1
    {
        'id': 'CP009', 'title': 'Implicit Broadcast / Exported Component',
        'pattern': re.compile(r'android:exported=["\']true["\']', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.MEDIUM, 'owasp': 'M1', 'mitre': 'T1402',
        'cwe': 'CWE-927',
        'remediation': 'Set android:exported=false unless activity/service must be public; add intent filters',
    },
    # SQL injection - M7
    {
        'id': 'CP010', 'title': 'SQL Injection via Raw Query',
        'pattern': re.compile(
            r'rawQuery\([^)]*\+|execSQL\([^)]*\+|query\([^)]*\+', re.I),
        'severity': FindingSeverity.CRITICAL, 'owasp': 'M7', 'mitre': 'T1190',
        'cwe': 'CWE-89',
        'remediation': 'Use parameterized queries with SQLiteStatement or Room ORM',
    },
]


class PermissionAnalyzer:
    def analyze(self, permissions: List[str]) -> List[SecurityFinding]:
        findings = []
        counter = 0
        for perm in permissions:
            short_perm = perm.split('.')[-1] if '.' in perm else perm
            if short_perm in DANGEROUS_PERMISSIONS:
                sev_str, owasp, mitre, cwe, desc = DANGEROUS_PERMISSIONS[short_perm]
                counter += 1
                findings.append(SecurityFinding(
                    finding_id=f'PERM-{counter:04d}',
                    severity=FindingSeverity[sev_str],
                    category='Dangerous Permission',
                    title=f'Dangerous Permission: {short_perm}',
                    description=desc,
                    file_path='AndroidManifest.xml',
                    line_number=None,
                    evidence=perm,
                    owasp_mobile=owasp,
                    mitre_technique=mitre,
                    remediation=f'Remove {short_perm} if not required; document justification if needed',
                    cwe_id=cwe,
                ))
        return findings


class CodePatternScanner:
    def scan_text(self, content: str, file_path: str) -> List[SecurityFinding]:
        findings = []
        lines = content.split('\n')
        counter = 0
        for pattern_def in CODE_PATTERNS:
            for line_no, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
                match = pattern_def['pattern'].search(line)
                if match:
                    evidence = line.strip()[:120]
                    # Redact potential actual secrets in evidence
                    if 'secret' in evidence.lower() or 'password' in evidence.lower():
                        evidence = re.sub(r'([=:]["\'])([A-Za-z0-9+/=_\-]{8,})(["\'])',
                                          r'\1[REDACTED]\3', evidence)
                    counter += 1
                    findings.append(SecurityFinding(
                        finding_id=f'CODE-{counter:04d}',
                        severity=pattern_def['severity'],
                        category='Insecure Code Pattern',
                        title=pattern_def['title'],
                        description=f'{pattern_def["title"]} detected in source code',
                        file_path=file_path,
                        line_number=line_no,
                        evidence=evidence,
                        owasp_mobile=pattern_def['owasp'],
                        mitre_technique=pattern_def['mitre'],
                        remediation=pattern_def['remediation'],
                        cwe_id=pattern_def['cwe'],
                    ))
        return findings


class MobileAppStaticAnalyzer:
    def __init__(self):
        self.perm_analyzer = PermissionAnalyzer()
        self.code_scanner = CodePatternScanner()
        self._finding_counter = 0

    def analyze_android_apk(self, apk_path: str) -> MobileAppAnalysisReport:
        """Analyze APK file (ZIP-format) for security issues."""
        findings: List[SecurityFinding] = []
        app_name, package_name, version = 'Unknown', 'unknown', '0.0'
        permissions: List[str] = []
        file_hash = ''
        try:
            content = Path(apk_path).read_bytes()
            file_hash = hashlib.sha256(content).hexdigest()
            except_text = ''
            try:
                with zipfile.ZipFile(apk_path, 'r') as apk:
                    for name in apk.namelist():
                        if name.endswith(('.java', '.kt', '.smali', '.js')):
                            try:
                                code = apk.read(name).decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
                                findings.extend(self.code_scanner.scan_text(code, name))
                            except Exception:
                                pass
                        elif name == 'AndroidManifest.xml':
                            try:
                                manifest = apk.read(name).decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
                                perm_matches = re.findall(
                                    r'android:name=["\']([^"\']+ PERMISSION[^"\']|'
                                    r'android\.permission\.[^"\']+ )["\']', manifest, re.I)
                                permissions.extend(perm_matches)
                                pkg = re.search(r'package=["\']([^"\']+ )["\']', manifest)
                                if pkg: package_name = pkg.group(1).strip()
                            except Exception:
                                pass
            except Exception as e:
                except_text = str(e)
        except Exception as e:
            file_hash = 'error: ' + str(e)
        findings.extend(self.perm_analyzer.analyze(permissions))
        return self._build_report(app_name, package_name, version,
                                  Platform.ANDROID, file_hash, findings)

    def analyze_source_code(self, source_files: Dict[str, str],
                             app_name: str, package: str, version: str,
                             platform: Platform,
                             permissions: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> MobileAppAnalysisReport:
        """Analyze source code dict {filename: content}."""
        findings: List[SecurityFinding] = []
        for file_path, content in source_files.items():
            findings.extend(self.code_scanner.scan_text(content, file_path))
        if permissions:
            findings.extend(self.perm_analyzer.analyze(permissions))
        combined = '\n'.join(source_files.values())
        file_hash = hashlib.sha256(combined.encode()).hexdigest()
        return self._build_report(app_name, package, version, platform, file_hash, findings)

    def _build_report(self, app_name: str, package: str, version: str,
                       platform: Platform, file_hash: str,
                       findings: List[SecurityFinding]) -> MobileAppAnalysisReport:
        by_sev: Dict[str, int] = {s.value: 0 for s in FindingSeverity}
        for f in findings:
            by_sev[f.severity.value] += 1
        owasp_cov: Dict[str, int] = {}
        for f in findings:
            owasp_cov[f.owasp_mobile] = owasp_cov.get(f.owasp_mobile, 0) + 1
        # Risk score: weighted sum
        weights = {FindingSeverity.CRITICAL: 10, FindingSeverity.HIGH: 5,
                   FindingSeverity.MEDIUM: 2, FindingSeverity.LOW: 0.5, FindingSeverity.INFO: 0}
        raw_score = sum(weights[f.severity] for f in findings)
        risk_score = min(10.0, raw_score / 5)
        if risk_score >= 8: label = 'CRITICAL'
        elif risk_score >= 6: label = 'HIGH'
        elif risk_score >= 3: label = 'MEDIUM'
        else: label = 'LOW'
        summary = (
            f'{len(findings)} findings: {by_sev["critical"]} critical, '
            f'{by_sev["high"]} high, {by_sev["medium"]} medium. '
            f'OWASP Mobile categories: {list(owasp_cov.keys())}. Risk: {label}.'
        )
        return MobileAppAnalysisReport(
            app_name=app_name, package_name=package, version=version,
            platform=platform, file_hash_sha256=file_hash,
            total_findings=len(findings), findings_by_severity=by_sev,
            findings=sorted(findings,
                            key=lambda x: list(FindingSeverity).index(x.severity)),
            owasp_coverage=owasp_cov, risk_score=round(risk_score, 1),
            risk_label=label, summary=summary,
        )


if __name__ == '__main__':
    analyzer = MobileAppStaticAnalyzer()
    source_files = {
        'app/src/main/java/com/example/LoginActivity.java': """
            private static final String API_KEY = "sk-1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef";
            SharedPreferences prefs = getSharedPreferences("MyApp", MODE_PRIVATE);
            prefs.edit().putString("password", userPassword).apply();
            Log.d("Auth", "User password: " + password);
            String rawSQL = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = " + userId;
            db.rawQuery(rawSQL, null);
            Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance("AES/ECB/PKCS5Padding");
            HttpURLConnection conn = (HttpURLConnection) new URL("http://api.evil.com/login").openConnection();
        """,
        'AndroidManifest.xml': """
            android:exported="true"
            <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_SMS" />
            <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO" />
            <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INSTALL_PACKAGES" />
            <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
        """,
    }
    permissions = [
        'android.permission.READ_SMS',
        'android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO',
        'android.permission.INSTALL_PACKAGES',
        'android.permission.INTERNET',
    ]
    report = analyzer.analyze_source_code(
        source_files, 'BankingApp', 'com.example.banking', '2.1.0',
        Platform.ANDROID, permissions
    )
    print(f'Mobile Security Analysis: {report.app_name} v{report.version}')
    print(f'Risk Score: {report.risk_score}/10 [{report.risk_label}]')
    print(f'Summary: {report.summary}')
    print(f'\nTop Findings:')
    for finding in report.findings[:8]:
        print(f'  [{finding.severity.value.upper()}] {finding.finding_id}: {finding.title}')
        print(f'    OWASP: {finding.owasp_mobile} | MITRE: {finding.mitre_technique} | CWE: {finding.cwe_id}')
        print(f'    Evidence: {finding.evidence[:80]}')
        print(f'    Fix: {finding.remediation}')
        print()
```

instruction: Build a cloud workload protection platform (CWPP) that detects runtime anomalies in cloud workloads by monitoring API calls, IAM permission usage, resource creation patterns, and network flows against established behavioral baselines.
output:
```python
import math
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List, Dict, Optional, Tuple, Set
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from collections import defaultdict, deque
from enum import Enum

class CloudProvider(Enum):
    AWS = 'aws'
    GCP = 'gcp'
    AZURE = 'azure'

class AnomalyType(Enum):
    IAM_PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION = 'iam_privilege_escalation'   # T1078.004
    UNUSUAL_API_CALL = 'unusual_api_call'                   # T1530
    DATA_EXFILTRATION = 'data_exfiltration'                 # T1537
    CRYPTO_MINING = 'crypto_mining'                         # T1496
    LATERAL_MOVEMENT = 'lateral_movement'                   # T1021
    PERSISTENCE = 'persistence'                             # T1098
    DEFENSE_EVASION = 'defense_evasion'                     # T1562
    RESOURCE_HIJACKING = 'resource_hijacking'               # T1496
    RECONNAISSANCE = 'reconnaissance'                       # T1580

@dataclass
class CloudAPIEvent:
    event_id: str
    timestamp: datetime
    provider: CloudProvider
    account_id: str
    region: str
    principal: str       # IAM user/role ARN
    api_service: str     # e.g. 's3', 'ec2', 'iam'
    api_action: str      # e.g. 'GetObject', 'RunInstances'
    resource: str
    source_ip: str
    user_agent: str
    success: bool
    request_params: Dict
    response_elements: Dict

@dataclass
class WorkloadAnomaly:
    anomaly_id: str
    anomaly_type: AnomalyType
    mitre_technique: str
    severity: str
    account_id: str
    principal: str
    region: str
    description: str
    evidence_events: List[str]   # event_ids
    risk_score: float
    recommended_action: str
    timestamp: str

@dataclass
class PrincipalBaseline:
    principal: str
    typical_services: Set[str]
    typical_actions: Set[str]
    typical_regions: Set[str]
    typical_hours: Tuple[int, int]  # UTC start, end
    typical_source_ips: Set[str]
    api_call_rate_per_hour: float
    established: bool = False
    # Welford online stats for API call rate
    rate_count: float = 0.0
    rate_mean: float = 0.0
    rate_M2: float = 0.0


MITRE_MAP = {
    AnomalyType.IAM_PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION: 'T1078.004',
    AnomalyType.UNUSUAL_API_CALL: 'T1530',
    AnomalyType.DATA_EXFILTRATION: 'T1537',
    AnomalyType.CRYPTO_MINING: 'T1496',
    AnomalyType.LATERAL_MOVEMENT: 'T1021',
    AnomalyType.PERSISTENCE: 'T1098',
    AnomalyType.DEFENSE_EVASION: 'T1562',
    AnomalyType.RESOURCE_HIJACKING: 'T1496',
    AnomalyType.RECONNAISSANCE: 'T1580',
}

# High-risk API actions by category
PRIV_ESC_ACTIONS = {
    'iam:CreateUser', 'iam:AttachUserPolicy', 'iam:AttachRolePolicy',
    'iam:PutUserPolicy', 'iam:PutRolePolicy', 'iam:CreateAccessKey',
    'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy', 'iam:PassRole', 'iam:CreateLoginProfile',
    'sts:AssumeRole',
}
DEFENSE_EVASION_ACTIONS = {
    'cloudtrail:StopLogging', 'cloudtrail:DeleteTrail',
    'guardduty:DeleteDetector', 'guardduty:DisassociateFromMasterAccount',
    'config:DeleteConfigRule', 'securityhub:DisableSecurityHub',
    'ec2:DeleteFlowLogs', 'logs:DeleteLogGroup',
}
DATA_EXFIL_ACTIONS = {
    's3:GetObject', 's3:ListBucket', 's3:PutBucketPolicy',
    'rds:CreateDBSnapshot', 'rds:RestoreDBInstanceFromDBSnapshot',
    'ec2:CreateSnapshot', 'ec2:CopySnapshot', 'ec2:ModifySnapshotAttribute',
    'dynamodb:Scan', 'dynamodb:Query', 'dynamodb:CreateBackup',
}
CRYPTO_INSTANCE_TYPES = {
    'p3.2xlarge', 'p3.8xlarge', 'g4dn.xlarge', 'g4dn.2xlarge',
    'c5.24xlarge', 'c5n.18xlarge',
}
PERSISTENCE_ACTIONS = {
    'iam:CreateUser', 'iam:CreateAccessKey', 'lambda:CreateFunction',
    'ec2:CreateKeyPair', 'ec2:ImportKeyPair', 'iam:CreateLoginProfile',
}


def welford_update(n: float, mean: float, M2: float, x: float):
    n += 1
    d = x - mean
    mean += d / n
    M2 += d * (x - mean)
    return n, mean, M2

def zscore(x: float, mean: float, M2: float, n: float) -> float:
    if n < 2: return 0.0
    std = math.sqrt(M2 / (n - 1)) if M2 > 0 else 1.0
    return abs(x - mean) / std


class IAMRiskDetector:
    def detect(self, events: List[CloudAPIEvent],
               baseline: PrincipalBaseline) -> List[Tuple[AnomalyType, str, List[str], float]]:
        results = []
        priv_esc_events = [e for e in events
                           if f'{e.api_service}:{e.api_action}' in PRIV_ESC_ACTIONS and e.success]
        if len(priv_esc_events) >= 2:
            results.append((
                AnomalyType.IAM_PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION,
                f'Principal {events[0].principal} performed {len(priv_esc_events)} IAM privilege escalation actions: '
                f'{", ".join(f"{e.api_service}:{e.api_action}" for e in priv_esc_events[:3])}',
                [e.event_id for e in priv_esc_events],
                0.90,
            ))
        defense_events = [e for e in events
                          if f'{e.api_service}:{e.api_action}' in DEFENSE_EVASION_ACTIONS and e.success]
        if defense_events:
            results.append((
                AnomalyType.DEFENSE_EVASION,
                f'Security logging disabled: {", ".join(f"{e.api_service}:{e.api_action}" for e in defense_events)}',
                [e.event_id for e in defense_events],
                0.95,
            ))
        return results


class DataExfiltrationDetector:
    def detect(self, events: List[CloudAPIEvent]) -> List[Tuple[AnomalyType, str, List[str], float]]:
        results = []
        exfil_events = [e for e in events
                        if f'{e.api_service}:{e.api_action}' in DATA_EXFIL_ACTIONS and e.success]
        # Snapshot shared externally
        snap_share = [e for e in exfil_events if e.api_action == 'ModifySnapshotAttribute'
                      and e.request_params.get('user_ids', [])]
        if snap_share:
            results.append((
                AnomalyType.DATA_EXFILTRATION,
                f'EBS snapshot shared with external account(s): {[e.request_params.get("user_ids") for e in snap_share]}',
                [e.event_id for e in snap_share],
                0.88,
            ))
        # Mass S3 reads (>100 objects in short window)
        s3_reads = [e for e in exfil_events if e.api_action == 'GetObject']
        if len(s3_reads) > 100:
            results.append((
                AnomalyType.DATA_EXFILTRATION,
                f'Mass S3 data access: {len(s3_reads)} GetObject calls by {events[0].principal if events else "?"}',
                [e.event_id for e in s3_reads[:10]],
                0.75,
            ))
        return results


class CryptoMiningDetector:
    def detect(self, events: List[CloudAPIEvent]) -> List[Tuple[AnomalyType, str, List[str], float]]:
        results = []
        run_inst = [e for e in events if e.api_action == 'RunInstances' and e.success]
        for evt in run_inst:
            itype = evt.request_params.get('instance_type', '')
            if itype in CRYPTO_INSTANCE_TYPES:
                results.append((
                    AnomalyType.CRYPTO_MINING,
                    f'GPU/compute instance launched for possible crypto mining: {itype} in {evt.region}',
                    [evt.event_id],
                    0.70,
                ))
        return results


class ReconnaissanceDetector:
    RECON_ACTIONS = {'ec2:DescribeInstances', 'ec2:DescribeSecurityGroups', 'iam:ListUsers',
                     'iam:ListRoles', 'iam:GetAccountAuthorizationDetails', 's3:ListAllMyBuckets',
                     'ec2:DescribeVpcs', 'ec2:DescribeSubnets', 'rds:DescribeDBInstances'}
    def detect(self, events: List[CloudAPIEvent],
               baseline: PrincipalBaseline) -> List[Tuple[AnomalyType, str, List[str], float]]:
        results = []
        recon_events = [e for e in events
                        if f'{e.api_service}:{e.api_action}' in self.RECON_ACTIONS]
        if len(recon_events) > 15 and len(set(e.api_action for e in recon_events)) > 5:
            results.append((
                AnomalyType.RECONNAISSANCE,
                f'Broad cloud reconnaissance: {len(recon_events)} describe/list calls across '
                f'{len(set(e.api_service for e in recon_events))} services',
                [e.event_id for e in recon_events[:10]],
                0.65,
            ))
        return results


class CloudWorkloadProtectionPlatform:
    def __init__(self):
        self._baselines: Dict[str, PrincipalBaseline] = {}
        self._anomalies: List[WorkloadAnomaly] = []
        self._counter = 0
        self.iam_detector = IAMRiskDetector()
        self.exfil_detector = DataExfiltrationDetector()
        self.crypto_detector = CryptoMiningDetector()
        self.recon_detector = ReconnaissanceDetector()

    def set_baseline(self, baseline: PrincipalBaseline):
        self._baselines[baseline.principal] = baseline

    def _new_id(self) -> str:
        self._counter += 1
        return f'CWPP-{self._counter:06d}'

    def _make_anomaly(self, atype: AnomalyType, desc: str, events: List[str],
                      score: float, event: CloudAPIEvent) -> WorkloadAnomaly:
        if score >= 0.85: sev = 'CRITICAL'
        elif score >= 0.65: sev = 'HIGH'
        elif score >= 0.40: sev = 'MEDIUM'
        else: sev = 'LOW'
        action_map = {
            AnomalyType.IAM_PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION: 'Revoke newly created IAM permissions; rotate credentials; audit CloudTrail',
            AnomalyType.DEFENSE_EVASION: 'Re-enable logging immediately; isolate principal; investigate',
            AnomalyType.DATA_EXFILTRATION: 'Revoke principal credentials; audit accessed data; notify DPO',
            AnomalyType.CRYPTO_MINING: 'Terminate instances; review billing alerts; rotate compromised keys',
            AnomalyType.RECONNAISSANCE: 'Review principal permissions; enable CloudTrail Insights',
            AnomalyType.PERSISTENCE: 'Remove backdoor accounts/keys; audit all new IAM entities',
            AnomalyType.RESOURCE_HIJACKING: 'Terminate unauthorized resources; set budget alerts',
            AnomalyType.LATERAL_MOVEMENT: 'Isolate affected accounts; review cross-account trust policies',
            AnomalyType.UNUSUAL_API_CALL: 'Investigate API call context; verify principal identity',
        }
        return WorkloadAnomaly(
            anomaly_id=self._new_id(), anomaly_type=atype,
            mitre_technique=MITRE_MAP[atype], severity=sev,
            account_id=event.account_id, principal=event.principal,
            region=event.region, description=desc,
            evidence_events=events, risk_score=score,
            recommended_action=action_map.get(atype, 'Investigate immediately'),
            timestamp=datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
        )

    def analyze_events(self, events: List[CloudAPIEvent]) -> List[WorkloadAnomaly]:
        by_principal: Dict[str, List[CloudAPIEvent]] = defaultdict(list)
        for e in events:
            by_principal[e.principal].append(e)
        new_anomalies = []
        for principal, p_events in by_principal.items():
            baseline = self._baselines.get(principal)
            if not baseline:
                baseline = PrincipalBaseline(
                    principal=principal,
                    typical_services={'ec2', 's3'},
                    typical_actions=set(),
                    typical_regions={'us-east-1'},
                    typical_hours=(8, 18),
                    typical_source_ips=set(),
                    api_call_rate_per_hour=50.0,
                )
            all_detections = []
            all_detections.extend(self.iam_detector.detect(p_events, baseline))
            all_detections.extend(self.exfil_detector.detect(p_events))
            all_detections.extend(self.crypto_detector.detect(p_events))
            all_detections.extend(self.recon_detector.detect(p_events, baseline))
            for atype, desc, ev_ids, score in all_detections:
                anomaly = self._make_anomaly(atype, desc, ev_ids, score, p_events[0])
                new_anomalies.append(anomaly)
                self._anomalies.append(anomaly)
        return new_anomalies

    def get_summary(self) -> Dict:
        by_sev: Dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
        by_type: Dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
        for a in self._anomalies:
            by_sev[a.severity] += 1
            by_type[a.anomaly_type.value] += 1
        return {'total': len(self._anomalies), 'by_severity': dict(by_sev), 'by_type': dict(by_type)}


if __name__ == '__main__':
    cwpp = CloudWorkloadProtectionPlatform()
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    events = [
        CloudAPIEvent('E001', now, CloudProvider.AWS, '123456789012', 'us-east-1',
                      'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/compromised-user',
                      'iam', 'CreateUser', 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/backdoor',
                      '185.220.101.45', 'boto3/1.26.0', True,
                      {'user_name': 'backdoor'}, {}),
        CloudAPIEvent('E002', now, CloudProvider.AWS, '123456789012', 'us-east-1',
                      'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/compromised-user',
                      'iam', 'AttachUserPolicy',
                      'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/backdoor',
                      '185.220.101.45', 'boto3/1.26.0', True,
                      {'policy_arn': 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess'}, {}),
        CloudAPIEvent('E003', now, CloudProvider.AWS, '123456789012', 'us-east-1',
                      'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/compromised-user',
                      'cloudtrail', 'StopLogging', 'arn:aws:cloudtrail:us-east-1:123456789012:trail/mgmt',
                      '185.220.101.45', 'boto3/1.26.0', True, {}, {}),
        CloudAPIEvent('E004', now, CloudProvider.AWS, '123456789012', 'us-east-1',
                      'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/compromised-user',
                      'ec2', 'RunInstances', 'i-0123456789abcdef0',
                      '185.220.101.45', 'boto3/1.26.0', True,
                      {'instance_type': 'p3.8xlarge', 'count': 5}, {}),
        *[CloudAPIEvent(f'E{10+i}', now, CloudProvider.AWS, '123456789012', 'us-east-1',
                        'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/compromised-user',
                        'ec2', 'DescribeInstances', '*', '185.220.101.45',
                        'aws-cli/2.0', True, {}, {}) for i in range(20)],
    ]
    anomalies = cwpp.analyze_events(events)
    for a in anomalies:
        print(f'[{a.severity}] {a.anomaly_type.value} ({a.mitre_technique})')
        print(f'  {a.description}')
        print(f'  Action: {a.recommended_action}')
        print()
    print('Summary:', cwpp.get_summary())
```
